description: Bootstrap a new tenant or customer namespace. Creates the confidential knowledge structure, default service bindings, and access policy for the tenant.

tenant.description: Tenant slug (lowercase, hyphenated). Becomes the directory name under knowledge/confidential/.

owner_email.description: Email address of the tenant owner for notifications and auth.

notes: Run `pnpm surfaces:reconcile` after applying to surface the new tenant in the operator dashboard.
